astraui_init.message0: Initialized AstraUI %1 Using U8g2 object %2 Root page %3 Display initialized %4
astraui_init.tooltip: Create U8g2Canvas and UI, start the interface after building the menu, and automatically refresh it in the loop. U8g2 must use fully buffered mode.

astraui_create_page.tooltip: Create AstraUI pages with the full life cycle of the program. Please create all pages first and then create submenu controls.

astraui_create_action.message0: Add action item %1 to page %2 Text %3 ID %4
astraui_create_action.tooltip: Adds a command-based menu item; an internal building block is executed when the user activates the item.

astraui_create_submenu.message0: Add submenu item %1 to page %2 text %3 target page %4 ID %5
astraui_create_submenu.tooltip: Add a submenu entry that opens another page. The target page must be created first.

astraui_create_toggle.message0: Add switch item %1 to page %2 Text %3 Data variable %4 Initial value %5 ID %6
astraui_create_toggle.tooltip: Add a switch control bound to a bool global data variable.

astraui_create_slider.message0: Add slider item %1 to page %2 text %3 data variable %4 ID %5
astraui_create_slider.message1: Initial value %1 Minimum %2 Maximum %3 Step %4 Suffix %5
astraui_create_slider.tooltip: Add a range slider bound to the int32_t global data variable.

astraui_create_choice.message0: Add option item %1 to page %2 text %3 data variable %4 ID %5
astraui_create_choice.tooltip: Add a loop selection control. Options are separated by commas, and the data variable stores the current index.

astraui_create_value.message0: Add read-only value item %1 to page %2 text %3 data variable %4 type %5 initial value %6 suffix %7 ID %8
astraui_create_value.tooltip: Adds a read-only status item for global integer variables read by the formatting callback.

astraui_create_separator.message0: Add delimiter %1 to page %2 text %3 ID %4
astraui_create_separator.tooltip: Add non-focusable section headers or dividers.

astraui_set_data_value.message0: Set AstraUI data variable %1 to %2 and refresh %3
astraui_set_data_value.tooltip: Updates the data variable bound to a switch, slider, option, or read-only item and requests a redraw.

astraui_data_value.tooltip: Reads the data variable bound to a switch, slider, option, or read-only value item.

astraui_set_item_state.tooltip: Toggles a control's enabled, displayed, or focusable state at runtime and requests a redraw.

astraui_set_item_label.tooltip: Replace the control text with a string constant valid within the program life cycle.

astraui_set_item_icon.message0: Control %1 Set XBM icon array %2 width %3 height %4 and refresh %5
astraui_set_item_icon.tooltip: Sets an existing XBM bitmap array for the control, often used on tile pages.

astraui_set_page_options.tooltip: Override title bar and circular navigation settings for a single page.

astraui_set_theme.message0: AstraUI %1 Theme %2 Show page title %3 Show scroll bar %4 Show tile footer %5 Select box width %6
astraui_set_theme.tooltip: Set the appearance of common themes. Should be placed inside the AstraUI initialization block, after the control declaration.

astraui_set_layout_metrics.message0: AstraUI %1 Layout Screen margins %2 Title height %3 List row height %4 Tile width %5 Icon width %6 Icon height %7
astraui_set_layout_metrics.tooltip: Adjust the main dimensions of lists, headers, and tiles to fit 128x32 or custom screens.

astraui_set_motion.tooltip: Applies a tuned set of spring animation parameters.

astraui_set_behavior.message0: AstraUI %1 Behavior Loop navigation %2 Skip disabled items %3 Remember focus %4 Cancel editing on return %5
astraui_set_behavior.message1: Continuous rendering %1 Idle refresh interval %2 milliseconds Toast duration %3 milliseconds
astraui_set_behavior.tooltip: Set navigation, editing, and refresh strategies. Dynamic status pages can use low-frequency idle refresh.

astraui_create_two_button.message0: Create dual button input %1 Control %2 Previous pin %3 Next pin %4 Active level %5 Pin mode %6
astraui_create_two_button.tooltip: Short press to navigate forward and backward; long press the previous key to return and the next key to activate. Automatically initialize and scan in loop.

astraui_create_three_button.message0: Create three-button input %1 Control %2 Previous %3 Next %4 Confirm %5 Valid level %6 Pin mode %7
astraui_create_three_button.tooltip: The front and back keys support long press for bursts, the confirmation key can be activated by short press and long press to return; it automatically scans in the loop.

astraui_set_button_timing.message0: Key input %1 Anti-bounce %2 Long press %3 Continuous delay %4 Continuous interval %5 milliseconds
astraui_set_button_timing.tooltip: Adjust key debounce, long press and automatic burst time.

astraui_dispatch.tooltip: Inject semantic input, suitable for encoders, serial ports, touch or custom buttons.

astraui_show_toast.message0: AstraUI %1 displays the prompt %2 for %3 milliseconds (0 uses default)
astraui_show_toast.tooltip: Display non-blocking toast prompts on the interface.

astraui_focus.tooltip: Let the current page focus on the specified original control index.

astraui_set_power_save.tooltip: Turn monitor power saving mode on or off.

astraui_status.tooltip: Query whether the interface has been started, is being edited, or is undergoing page transition.

astraui_focus_index.tooltip: Returns the original focus index of the current page.

astraui_navigation_depth.tooltip: Returns the page navigation stack depth.

astraui_current_item_id.tooltip: Returns the current control ID; returns 0 if there is no current control.

astraui_begin_result_message.tooltip: Returns the readable result of the most recent begin, such as a fully buffered mode error.

astraui_when_event.tooltip: Register global AstraUI event handlers. Event judgment and value building blocks can be used internally.

astraui_event_is.tooltip: Can only be used inside the AstraUI event handling block.

astraui_event_value.tooltip: Returns the value carried by the current event; it can only be used inside the event processing block.

astraui_event_item_id.tooltip: Returns the current event control ID; returns 0 if there is no control. Can only be used inside event handling blocks.

astraui_event_page_id.tooltip: Returns the current event page ID; returns 0 if there is no page. Can only be used inside event handling blocks.
